name: scan_stalled_engagements
description: Scan investor-deal engagements on live deals for stalled or overdue items: idle beyond the per-stage threshold, disbursements still outstanding, or issued term sheets missing their date. Read-only — offer create_followup_task for any flag the deal lead wants actioned.

deal.description: Limit the scan to one transaction/deal (name or exact id)

investor.description: Limit the scan to one investor (name or exact id)
